Ship with SCIM, Self-Service SSO, and 1 Enterprise Connection. Now free.
Secure the human who is prompting the agent in the first place.

Use our Token Vault to manage which APIs your agent 
can call on the user's behalf.
Apply fine-grained authorization directly to your RAG pipelines.
Add enterprise-grade auth to internal dashboards, AI apps, and tools in minutes.
Use SSO and M2M authentication to better secure humans, machines, AI agents, and MCP servers.
Automate provisioning and fine-tune access as your team and tools evolve.
Get full control without the heavy lifting.

Add SSO and SCIM with a simple toggle, making you 
enterprise-grade, right out of the box. Now free.

Make it painless for IT buyers with automated setup 
and session control.

Sign-up, login, and re-engagement powered by APIs, 
Forms, and Actions.

Give customers fast, passwordless logins. Adaptive MFA and bot 
detection keep things safe without getting in their way.

Extend identity to mobile apps, point-of-sale, 
and other connected devices.
Auth0 enabled us to reduce our IAM-related development and maintenance by 80%, freeing us to focus on new lighting and security offerings that truly differentiate our products rather than reinventing
“We used Auth0 from day one to be able to spend our limited time on innovating and creating new user experiences rather than building another user authentication system.“
“As we’re growing with these customers, something that’s very clear is that big customers really care about identity management and security.”
“The best way to grow as a company is to take a look at the customers that you already have strong relationships with and expand on those...”
“Security and identity go hand in hand. And as a security product, this is one of the things we have to be really on top of.”
